title: papaver alpinum subvar. fallacinum
intro: Papaver alpinum subvar. fallacinum, also known as the Alpine Poppy, is a variant of the Papaver alpinum plant, characterized by its unique characteristics and growth habits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum subvar. fallacinum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
